xesmf.bench_regridder_apply.LocstreamApp.code:
class LocstreamApplication:
    def time_apply_locstream(self, src_size, n_boundary_pts, ntime):
        self.regridder(self.src_data)

    def setup(self, src_size, n_boundary_pts, ntime):
        snlon, snlat = src_size
        src_grid = make_rect_grid(snlon, snlat)
        dst_grid = make_locstream_grid(n_boundary_pts)
        self.src_data = make_data_variable(src_grid, ntime=ntime)
        self.regridder = xe.Regridder(
            src_grid,
            dst_grid,
            method="bilinear",
            locstream_out=True,
            periodic=False,
            reuse_weights=False,
            unmapped_to_nan=True,
        )
xesmf.bench_regridder_apply.LocstreamApp.name: xesmf.bench_regridder_apply.LocstreamApplication.time_apply_locstream

xesmf.bench_regridder_apply.RegridderApp.code:
class RegridderApplication:
    def mem_apply(self, src_size, dst_size, ntime, method):
        self.regridder(self.src_data)

    def setup(self, src_size, dst_size, ntime, method):
        snlon, snlat = src_size
        dnlon, dnlat = dst_size
        src_grid = make_rect_grid(snlon, snlat)
        dst_grid = make_curvilinear_grid(dnlon, dnlat)
        self.src_data = make_data_variable(src_grid, ntime=ntime)
        self.regridder = xe.Regridder(
            src_grid,
            dst_grid,
            method=method,
            periodic=False,
            reuse_weights=False,
            unmapped_to_nan=True,
        )

class RegridderApplicationMultiVar:
    def time_apply_multi_var(self, src_size, dst_size, nvars):
        self.regridder(self.src_data)

    def setup(self, src_size, dst_size, nvars):
        snlon, snlat = src_size
        dnlon, dnlat = dst_size
        src_grid = make_rect_grid(snlon, snlat)
        dst_grid = make_curvilinear_grid(dnlon, dnlat)
        self.src_data = make_data_variable(src_grid, ntime=12, nvars=nvars)
        self.regridder = xe.Regridder(
            src_grid,
            dst_grid,
            method="bilinear",
            periodic=False,
            reuse_weights=False,
            unmapped_to_nan=True,
        )

        xe.Regridder(
            self.src,
            self.dst,
            method=method,
            locstream_out=True,
            periodic=False,
            reuse_weights=False,
            unmapped_to_nan=True,
        )

    def setup(self, src_size, n_boundary_pts, method):
        from benchmarks.common.synthetic_data import make_locstream_grid
    
        snlon, snlat = src_size
        self.src = make_rect_grid(snlon, snlat)
        self.dst = make_locstream_grid(n_boundary_pts)

xesmf.bench_regridder_creation.Regridder.code:
class RegridderWeightReuse:
    def time_create_with_reuse_setting(self, src_size, dst_size, reuse_weights):
        xe.Regridder(
            self.src,
            self.dst,
            method="bilinear",
            periodic=False,
            reuse_weights=reuse_weights,
            filename=self._weight_file,
            unmapped_to_nan=True,
        )

    def setup(self, src_size, dst_size, reuse_weights):
        import tempfile
        import os
    
        snlon, snlat = src_size
        dnlon, dnlat = dst_size
        self.src = make_rect_grid(snlon, snlat)
        self.dst = make_curvilinear_grid(dnlon, dnlat)
    
        self._tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
        self._weight_file = os.path.join(
            self._tmpdir, f"weights_{snlon}x{snlat}_to_{dnlon}x{dnlat}.nc"
        )
    
        if reuse_weights:
            # Pre-generate the weight file so reuse actually reuses
            xe.Regridder(
                self.src,
                self.dst,
                method="bilinear",
                periodic=False,
                reuse_weights=False,
                filename=self._weight_file,
                unmapped_to_nan=True,
            )
xesmf.bench_regridder_creation.Regridder.name: xesmf.bench_regridder_creation.RegridderWeightReuse.time_create_with_reuse_setting
